name: Oath of Loyalty
fracture_violation_example: Betraying or abandoning a sworn ward or ally in direct peril

name: Oath of Restraint
fracture_violation_example: Using lethal force against a surrendered or defenseless enemy

name: Oath of Sacrifice
fracture_violation_example: Choosing self-preservation over lives of sworn charges

name: Oath of Clarity
fracture_violation_example: Deceiving those you have sworn to serve or protect
